base.work: Reflective time — keep the load light and let ideas simmer.
base.food: Cozy, warm meals; keep it gentle.
base.move: Gentle only — walks, stretching, slow flows.

dayVariants.work: Clear the calendar where you can; essentials only.
Still low-power mode — shortlists, not marathons.

dayVariants.move: A slow walk might feel surprisingly good.

tips: Cancel one thing today. Omahi won't tell.
Warm drink, warm blanket, low expectations.
Write down the one thing that actually matters this week — just one.
Your pace today is the right pace.

base.work: Execution mode — start the project you've been circling.
base.food: Lighter, brighter meals suit this stretch.
base.rest: Say yes to plans; adventure suits you.

dayVariants.work: Pick the thing you'll build this cycle and take the first step.

dayVariants.move: Add a little more than last time — it will probably feel easy.

dayVariants.work: Momentum is real now — block a deep-work morning.

tips: That idea from yesterday? Today's the day to open the doc.
Book the thing you've been putting off — future you says thanks.
Ride the momentum: one bold email, sent.
Try the new route, the new recipe, the new anything.

base.work: Big meetings, pitches, hard conversations — schedule them now.
base.move: Your hardest workouts land well now.
base.rest: Most social stretch — plan the dinner.

dayVariants.work: Peak-day energy: the pitch, the ask, the talk.

dayVariants.rest: One more yes before the wind-down.

tips: Ask for the thing. This is the week they'll hear you best.
Say the hard thing kindly — your delivery is on point right now.
Plan the dinner, own the room.
Charisma days: spend them on people, not inboxes.

base.work: Details, admin, finishing — notice what feels off.
base.food: A few more calories are normal; eat warmly.
base.move: Taper from harder to lighter as the days pass.

dayVariants.work: Switch from starting to finishing — close loops.

dayVariants.move: Still strong days — use them, then ease off.

tips: Unfinished loops feel louder now. Close two small ones.
If everything feels slightly off, that's the phase talking — jot it down before acting on it.
Tidy one drawer, one folder, one list. Instant relief.
Lower the bar a notch; keep the streak alive.
